Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
J. Peter Shearer, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Graig L. McCarty.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Craigco, Inc., Craig Currie and Fanny Gallo-Currie.
Default entered as to all defendants on 08/01/07.
Amended default entered as all defendants on 10/19/07.
Bankruptcy stay as to defendants Craig Currie & Fanny Gallo-Currie.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Craigco, Inc. as follows:
Special Damages - $80,000.00
General Damages - $103,000.00
Interest - $15,719.13
Attorney's Fees $46,623.86
Costs $1,378.27 for a total judgment of 246,721.26.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Continued To Feb-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Michaelle Young, Esq. for Plaintiff: Craig L. McCarty, also present, was sworn and examined.
Matter is put over to Feb. 7, 2008 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Peding bankruptcy hearing, counsel to file a Notice of Stay in this court for the Bankruptcy Defendants.
